scripts.eval: npm run eval:build && node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/collectors/capture-all.js && node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/run-evaluation.js && node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/reports/generate-html.js
scripts.eval:interactive: npm run eval:build && EVAL_INTERACTIVE=1 node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/collectors/capture-all.js && node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/run-evaluation.js && node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/reports/generate-html.js
scripts.eval:baidu: npm run eval:build && EVAL_TARGET=baidu node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/collectors/capture-all.js && node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/run-evaluation.js && node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/reports/generate-html.js
scripts.eval:baidu:interactive: npm run eval:build && EVAL_TARGET=baidu EVAL_INTERACTIVE=1 node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/collectors/capture-all.js && node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/run-evaluation.js && node .evaluator-dist/evaluator/reports/generate-html.js
